analysis: The project has three main UI implementations: test-website, github-page, and docs. The event.json specifies the topic as 'blackholes' with a theme request for 'no bulk animated objects slide animated page'. The docs folder appears to be the most relevant for implementing a black hole themed UI with animated slides. The current docs implementation likely needs enhancements to align with the black hole theme and include animated slide functionality.
